chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C.P.No.S-468 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 23-06-2025 M/s Atif Imran Khowja and Kaleemullah, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Javed, AAG a/wP.I. M.Nawaz of P.S.Sujjawal and SIP Deedar Ali of P.S. Jati. ========= Syed Waqas Ahmed Shah advocate has filed Vakalatnama on behalf of respondents No.5 to 7, taken on record. Likewise, Mr.Athar Uddin Abro, advocate has also fled Vakalatnama on behalf of respondent No.9. Learned AAG has filed reply on behalf of Respondents No.3 and 4, which are taken on record. Learned counsel for applicant after arguing the instant petition at some length has submitted that he is not pressing this petition, if the official respondents comply the order dated 27.01.2025 passed by the Ex-Officio Justice of Peace Sujjawal. SHO P.S. Jati District Sujjawal is present before this court and he undertakes that he will provide the protection to the petitioner according to law in compliance of passed order in law and spirit. For the foregoing reasons, the instant petition is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE
